info.title: Retriever Core Platform
info.description: Headless Multi-Tenant AI Knowledge Platform Memory Layer API

get.description: Liveness probe to confirm the API server process is running.
Readiness probe to confirm database, cache, and storage infrastructure connection endpoints are alive.

post.description: Register a new tenant workspace bounds (System-wide Admin).

schema.title: Response Update Global Config V1 Config Global Put

get.description: Get global configurations with secrets redacted (Admin only).

put.description: Update / override configuration settings for the tenant workspace.

schema.title: Response Update Tenant Config V1 Tenants  Tenantid  Config Put

get.description: Get configuration settings for the tenant workspace (secrets redacted).

post.description: Generate a new Bearer API credential token for the tenant.

get.description: List all tenants with optional search and pagination (System-wide Admin).

Response Admin Deactivate Tenant V1 Admin Tenants  Tenantid  Delete

post.description: Execute hybrid search across tenant document vectors and keyword indexes.
Create a new chat session for grounded inference.

Send a message to a chat session and get a grounded inference response.

When ``stream=true`` (default), returns a Server-Sent Events stream.
When ``stream=false``, returns a JSON response.

get.description: Retrieve message history for a chat session with cursor-based pagination.

schema.title: Response List Session Messages V1 Tenants  Tenantid  Chat Sessions  Sessionid  Messages Get

post.description: Submit or update user feedback (thumbs up/down + optional comments) for a chat response.

schema.title: Response Submit Message Feedback V1 Tenants  Tenantid  Chat Sessions  Sessionid  Messages  Messageid  Feedback Post

get.description: Get aggregated message feedback analytics for a tenant (Admin only).

schema.title: Response Get Tenant Feedback Analytics V1 Admin Tenants  Tenantid  Feedback Analytics Get

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Rating score, +1 for positive, -1 for negative.

query.default: What is the capital of France?
